label: Rotate Zum Rails API key
description: Issue a new key in the Zum portal, deploy to PaySpyre, then revoke the TurnKey-held key.

label: Rotate Zum webhook signing secret
description: Generate a fresh HMAC secret, update PaySpyre verification, retire the TurnKey one.

label: Switch PAD return / NSF webhook → PaySpyre
description: Point bounce notifications at /api/webhooks/zum/pad-returns. Required before PaySpyre processes any debits.

label: Switch payment status webhook → PaySpyre
description: Posted / failed / cancelled callbacks to /api/webhooks/zum/payments.

label: Add PaySpyre platform IPs to Zum allowlist
description: Vercel egress IPs + any future fixed-IP proxy.

label: Re-verify PAD-007 form template
description: PaySpyre branding + lender info on the borrower-facing PAD form.

label: Rotate Flinks API key
description: Issue PaySpyre-owned key, deploy, revoke the TurnKey-held key.

label: Switch verification-complete webhook → PaySpyre
description: Bank-verification completion callbacks to /api/webhooks/flinks/verification.

label: Update post-login redirect URL
description: Borrower returns to PaySpyre Originations after Flinks login flow.

label: Confirm Flinks Capital subscription tier
description: PaySpyre needs the Capital tier for the income/balance signals on the Bank tab.

label: Rotate SignNow API key
description: Issue PaySpyre key, deploy, revoke TurnKey one.

label: Switch signature-complete webhook → PaySpyre
description: /api/webhooks/signnow/complete; required before any new agreement can fully execute.

label: Re-verify document template ids
description: Loan agreement / disclosure templates referenced by PaySpyre on send.

label: Rotate SendGrid API key
description: Issue PaySpyre-owned key, deploy, revoke TurnKey one.

label: Switch event webhook → PaySpyre
description: Bounce / unsubscribe / spam-report events to /api/webhooks/sendgrid/events.

label: Migrate template IDs to PaySpyre namespace
description: Re-create transactional email templates under PaySpyre account; update PaySpyre code to reference the new ids.

label: Update SPF / DKIM records
description: DNS at PaySpyre's domain registrar must authorize the PaySpyre-owned SendGrid sender.

label: Rotate Equifax API credentials
description: PaySpyre-owned member number + secret. Confirm bureau team has the new lender details on file.

label: Switch hard-pull callback URL → PaySpyre
description: Bureau result delivery to /api/webhooks/equifax/result.

label: Re-verify member / account number
description: PaySpyre as the named lender on every credit pull receipt + adverse-action notice.

label: Rotate Walnut API key (if integrated)
description: Only required once creditor-insurance enrollment goes live; safe to leave PENDING until then.

label: Rotate MessageBird API key
description: MessageBird is currently inactive; mark this item N/A until SMS goes live.
notes: SMS not active in production. Re-open when MessageBird is wired up.
